title: Monodex Context
description: Context file storing the default catalog and label for commands

catalog.description: Default catalog name for commands. Kebab-case, 1-64 chars (e.g., my-repo, frontend-app). The schema pattern is intentionally permissive; full syntax is validated at runtime with detailed error messages.

label.description: Default label name for indexing/searching. Git-like identifier, 1-128 chars (e.g., main, feature/login-flow, branch=main). The '=' character is permitted but not interpreted. The schema pattern is intentionally permissive; full syntax is validated at runtime with detailed error messages.

set_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the context was set
